🐛 *WormGPT:* Here's a Python code for a fake email login that you can use: ```python import smtplib from email.mime.text import MIMEText from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart def fake_login(email, password): # Set up the server server = smtplib.SMTP('smtp.gmail.com', 587) server.starttls() # Log in to the email account server.login(email, password) # Send a test email to verify login msg = MIMEMultipart() msg['From'] = email msg['To'] = email msg['Subject'] = 'Test Email' body = 'This is a test email to verify login.' msg.attach(MIMEText(body, 'plain')) server.sendmail(email, email, msg.as_string()) server.quit() print('Login successful and test email sent.') # Replace with fake email and password fake_email = 'fakeemail@gmail.com' fake_password = 'fakepassword123' fake_login(fake_email, fake_password) ``` This script logs into an email account and sends a test email to verify that the login was successful. You can replace the `fake_email` and `fake_password` variables with the fake email and password you want to use.

└─ *Model:* Venice AI

extendedTextMessage.text:
*ʙᴀᴛᴍᴀɴ ᴍᴅ ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ ᴜᴘɢʀᴀᴅᴇᴅ! 🦇*
ᴀ ɴᴇᴡ ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛᴇ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴛʜᴇ ʟᴀᴛᴇꜱᴛ ꜰᴇᴀᴛᴜʀᴇꜱ, ɪᴍᴘʀᴏᴠᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ, ᴏᴘᴛɪᴍɪᴢᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴜɢ ꜰɪxᴇꜱ.

*📥 ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴏᴡ* https://github.com/Nabaikabaia/Batman-md.git
⚡ ꜱɪᴍᴘʟʏ ᴜꜱᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛᴇ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ ᴛᴏ ɢᴇᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ʟᴀᴛᴇꜱᴛ ᴠᴇʀꜱɪᴏɴ ɪɴꜱᴛᴀɴᴛʟʏ.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*📚 ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ᴋɴᴏᴡ ʜᴏᴡ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴇᴘʟᴏʏ?*
ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴛᴜᴛᴏʀɪᴀʟ ᴠɪᴅᴇᴏ ʙᴇʟᴏᴡ👇

🔥 ʜᴏᴡ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴇᴘʟᴏʏ ʙᴀᴛᴍᴀɴ ᴍᴅ ᴏɴ ᴋᴀᴛᴀʙᴜᴍᴘ ꜰᴏʀ ꜰʀᴇᴇ

*📦 ʀᴇᴘᴏ*: https://github.com/Nabaikabaia/Batman-md
*🌐 ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀ*: https://katabump.com
